nasb.text: For in that day every man will cast away his silver idols and his gold idols, which your sinful hands have made for you as a sin.

esv.text: For in that day everyone shall cast away his idols of silver and his idols of gold, which your hands have sinfully made for you.

cnv.text: 到那日，各人都必拋棄 自己的金偶像和銀偶像， 就是你們親手所做，把自己陷在罪中的。

ccb.text: 到那日，你们都要抛弃自己用罪恶双手制造的金银偶像。

csbs.text: 到那日，你们各人都必抛弃亲手所造的金偶像和银偶像，就是你们为自己造的孽。
